name: p6xer-mcp-server
description: Parse, analyze, and quality-check Primavera P6 XER schedule files. Exposes 13 tools for critical path analysis, earned value, resource utilization, DCMA quality checks, and more.

tools.name: parse_xer_file
tools.description: Parse a P6 XER file and return project list, activity counts, resources, and calendars

tools.name: get_project_activities
tools.description: Get activities filtered by project, status, or task type

tools.name: get_critical_path
tools.description: Find critical path activities with zero or negative total float

tools.name: analyze_resource_utilization
tools.description: Planned/actual hours and costs per resource with over-allocation flags

tools.name: check_schedule_quality
tools.description: DCMA-style schedule quality check: missing logic, long durations, high float

tools.name: get_resources
tools.description: List all resources, optionally filtered by type

tools.name: get_resource_assignments
tools.description: Resource-activity assignments with enriched names and costs

tools.name: get_relationships
tools.description: Predecessor/successor relationships enriched with task codes

tools.name: get_schedule_summary
tools.description: At-a-glance schedule stats, date range, and critical count

tools.name: get_earned_value
tools.description: EVM metrics: PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI, EAC per project

tools.name: get_activity_detail
tools.description: Full detail for a single activity including predecessors, successors, and resources
